becomeSupplier.title: Become a Supplier
becomeSupplier.subtitle: Join our supplier network and grow together

form.businessPlaceholder: Please describe the company's main business
form.intentionPlaceholder: Please describe your cooperation intention and expectations

submitApplication.title: Submit Application
submitApplication.description: Fill in the supplier application form and submit basic company information

qualificationReview.title: Qualification Review
qualificationReview.description: We will review your application within 3-5 business days

businessNegotiation.title: Business Negotiation
businessNegotiation.description: After approval, our business team will contact you

signAgreement.title: Sign Agreement
signAgreement.description: Both parties confirm cooperation details and sign a formal cooperation agreement

onlineDocking.title: Online Docking
onlineDocking.description: The technical team assists in completing product docking and going live

becomeSupplier.success: Application submitted successfully! We will contact you within 3-5 business days!
